instruction: Building a boat step by step (step 3 of 6). So far you've drawn: wave-1, hull. Add the next part: line ((64,88)→(64,16), stroke #222, stroke-width 3) with id "mast".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <polyline id="wave-1" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="8,108 24,104 40,108 56,104 72,108 88,104 104,108 120,104" />
  <polygon id="hull" fill="#92400e" points="16,88 112,88 96,104 32,104" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <polyline id="wave-1" fill="none" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="8,108 24,104 40,108 56,104 72,108 88,104 104,108 120,104" />
  <polygon id="hull" fill="#92400e" points="16,88 112,88 96,104 32,104" />
  <line id="mast" stroke="#222" stroke-width="3" x1="64" y1="88" x2="64" y2="16" />
</svg>
